template.name: Enterprise Data Warehouse ETL Pipeline
template.description: Comprehensive data warehouse ETL template with dimensional modeling, slowly changing dimensions (SCD), data lineage tracking, and enterprise-grade performance optimization for large-scale analytics.

configuration.description: Daily ETL run at 2 AM UTC

configuration.subject: ETL Job {{execution_id}} - {{job_status}} - {{timestamp}}
configuration.html_body:
ETL Job Completion Report

Job Summary

  • Execution ID: {{execution_id}}
  • Status: {{job_status}}
  • Start Time: {{start_time}}
  • Duration: {{execution_time_ms / 60000}} minutes
  • Records Processed: {{total_records_processed:,}}

Dimension Processing

{{#each dimension_results}}{{/each}}
DimensionSource RecordsNew RecordsUpdated RecordsStatus
{{@key}}{{source_records_processed:,}}{{new_records_created:,}}{{existing_records_updated:,}}{{status}}

Fact Processing

{{#each fact_results}}{{/each}}
Fact TableSource RecordsInserted RecordsOrphaned RecordsStatus
{{@key}}{{source_records_processed:,}}{{fact_records_inserted:,}}{{orphaned_records:,}}{{status}}

Data Quality

  • Overall Score: {{overall_quality_score}}/100
  • Total Tests: {{validation_summary.total_tests}}
  • Passed Tests: {{validation_summary.passed_tests}}
  • Failed Tests: {{validation_summary.failed_tests}}
    • {{#if failed_tests.length}}
  • Critical Failures: {{validation_summary.critical_failures}}
    • {{/if}}
{{#if failed_tests.length}}

Failed Quality Tests

    {{#each failed_tests}}
  • {{test}}: Expected {{expected_value}}, got {{actual_value}} ({{severity}} severity)
    • {{/each}}
{{/if}}

Performance Metrics

  • Throughput: {{performance_metrics.records_per_second}} records/sec
  • Peak Memory: {{performance_metrics.memory_usage_peak_mb}} MB
  • Avg CPU: {{performance_metrics.cpu_usage_avg_percent}}%
  • Performance Rating: {{performance_rating}}
{{#if optimization_recommendations.length}}

Performance Recommendations

    {{#each optimization_recommendations}}
  • {{type}}: {{recommendation}} (Current: {{current_value}}, Target: {{target_value}})
    • {{/each}}
{{/if}}

Report generated at {{timestamp}}

dimension_config.description: Configuration for dimension table processing with SCD support

fact_config.description: Configuration for fact table processing and dimension lookups

quality_tests.description: Data quality validation tests to run post-ETL

documentation.setup_guide:
1. Configure source and target database connections
2. Define dimension and fact table configurations
3. Set up SCD Type 2 processing rules
4. Configure data quality tests
5. Set up email notifications
6. Test with sample datasets
7. Schedule regular ETL runs
8. Monitor performance and optimize
use_cases: Enterprise data warehouse loading with star schema
Customer 360 data consolidation with SCD tracking
Financial reporting data pipeline with quality validation

troubleshooting.scd_processing_errors: Verify dimension key relationships and business key uniqueness
troubleshooting.performance_issues: Optimize SQL queries, increase batch sizes, or add database indexes
troubleshooting.quality_test_failures: Review test thresholds and investigate data source changes
troubleshooting.orphaned_fact_records: Check dimension loading order and unknown dimension handling
